title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has created an AI-powered enhancement to the mouse pointer that provides contextual understanding of what is being pointed at and its relevance. The capability reimagines the traditional mouse pointer interaction paradigm using AI to add semantic awareness to cursor positioning.
